title: Command Output v1
description: Mycelium routes large command outputs to Hyphae for chunked storage via the hyphae_store_command_output MCP tool. Producer: mycelium/src/hyphae_client.rs. Consumer: hyphae-mcp/src/tools/ingest.rs.

schema_version.description: Contract version. Receivers should reject unknown versions.

command.description: The command that produced this output (e.g., 'cargo test').

output.description: Raw command output to be chunked and stored.

project.description: Project name for scoping. Auto-detected from git root if omitted.

project_root.description: Canonical filesystem path to the repository root. Part of identity pair.

worktree_id.description: Git worktree identifier. 'main' for primary, worktree name for linked.

ttl_hours.description: Time-to-live in hours for the stored chunks. Default: 4 hours.
